title: Author product-detail views for the Utilities aisle
description: Author three product-detail views — one per Utilities widget — reusing the shared page skeleton from task 14.

per_widget_notes: TViewBuilder: preview shows a mini view-builder hosting an inner dummy view model, with counters visible for onModelReady / onModelDispose fires and a 'recreate' button that forces a fresh host instance.

TResponsiveBuilder: preview is itself a live TResponsiveBuilder whose builder callback renders a text panel showing the current TData and TTools values — so the visitor can resize and see them change.
TMarkdownFileItem: preview renders an inline markdown snippet sourced from MockContentService.markdownContent(); a dropdown in debug controls picks the active filename.

goals: Three product detail view files under example/lib/showcase/feature/utilities/views/{widget_snake_case}_showcase/.
Each uses the shared page skeleton.
TResponsiveBuilder page reads live TData/TTools from the builder callback and renders them as text — the visitor can resize the window and watch the values change.
acceptance_criteria: Opening each of the three pages renders the full page structure.
TViewBuilder preview visibly shows lifecycle counters incrementing on recreate.
TResponsiveBuilder preview visibly updates TData/TTools readings as the window is resized.
TMarkdownFileItem preview renders markdown and toasts when tapped.
tools_to_use: RepoPrompt MCP for reading each widget's source.

verification_gate: Manual verification of every preview, including resizing for TResponsiveBuilder.
